name: Corn Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix dry ingredients in a bowl.
2. Add lightly beaten egg, milk, and melted butter to the dry mixture.
3. Stir until just combined; avoid overmixing to prevent air pockets and pointed tops.
4. Fill prepared muffin tins (lined with cupcake papers) about 2/3 full with batter.
5. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes.
